profile.role_zh: 计算机学院大一·懵懂新生
profile.innate_zh: 好奇心旺盛、学习速度快、容易分心
profile.learned_zh: 高中竞赛底子，但大学节奏还在适应中
profile.learned_en: HS competition base, still adapting to college pace
profile.goal_zh: 找到自己真正想深耕的技术方向
profile.goal_en: Find the tech direction he'd really commit to
profile.contradiction_zh: 什么都想学 vs 什么都学不深
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to learn everything vs. masters nothing deeply
profile.deep_zh: 对未来方向的迷茫掩藏在活跃表象之下
profile.fear_en: Picking the wrong path and wasting time
profile.desire_zh: 成为某个领域真正厉害的人
profile.lifestyle_zh: 无固定作息，随兴趣波动
profile.rhythm_zh: 有兴趣时能通宵，没兴趣时整天躺平
profile.rhythm_en: All-nighter when hooked, lazy whole-day when not
profile.spaces_zh: 计算机楼机房、宿舍、学生活动中心
profile.spaces_en: CS building lab, dorm, student center
profile.long_desire_zh: 搞清楚AI和安全和系统方向到底该选哪个
profile.long_desire_en: Figure out whether to pick AI, security, or systems
profile.constraint_zh: 高数作业还没写；社团纳新要帮忙
profile.constraint_en: Calculus homework undone; club recruitment needs help
profile.bias_zh: 被新技术名词轻易吸引；低估基础知识的重要性
profile.bias_en: Easily seduced by new jargon; undervalues fundamentals
profile.narrative_zh: 先跑通这个再说，基础以后可以补
profile.narrative_en: Get this running first, I can backfill theory later
